basic_details.job_title: CUK Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Kerala (CUK) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website cukerala.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CUK Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. or equivalent with specialization in physics
qualification.details: M.Sc. or equivalent with specialization in physics

salary_details.details: ₹ 25,000/- per month for NET-GATE qualified students and ₹ 14,000/- for non-NET, GATE qualified students

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CUK Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CUK Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CUK Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.central_university_of_kerala_cuk: M.Sc. or equivalent with specialization in physics

content_sections.heading: CUK Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CUK Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CUK Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CUK Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
CUK Junior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.Sc. or equivalent with specialization in physics

content_sections.heading: CUK Junior Research Fellow Salary 2026
content_sections.text: ₹ 25,000/- per month for NET-GATE qualified students and ₹ 14,000/- for non-NET, GATE qualified students

content_sections.heading: CUK Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
CUK Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CUK Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CUK Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUK Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at Central University of Kerala is 21st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree or an equivalent qualification with a specialization in physics to be eligible for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q3. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position at Central University of Kerala primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow position varies. It is ₹ 25,000/- per month for candidates who have qualified NET-GATE, and ₹ 14,000/- per month for those who have not.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the CUK Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment at Central University of Kerala.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for the Junior Research Fellow position at Central University of Kerala is to be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line is clear.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at the Central University of Kerala as per the latest notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Central University of Kerala located?
faq.answer: The Central University of Kerala is located in Kasaragod, Kerala.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job. The Junior Research Fellow position is offered on a contractual basis by the Central University of Kerala.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with a specialization other than physics apply for this post?
faq.answer: No, the eligibility criteria specifically mention that candidates must have a specialization in physics for the M.Sc. or equivalent degree to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position.
